{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321122502CDF844BD4F39085FAD06"}"},"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7494882324869071678","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"就佩服干脆行动，想干就干，顺风顺水，超级好看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1745046238,"group_id":"7458947535609007129","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+udQxjNDdqO+7bFpMpKMWXvIEnrUfYeLqR715zKqLk/","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616050&x-signature=DrAQG0h3j%2BuZjDoa%2FpIJp7vPNFs%3D","user_id":"2550498321508216","user_name":"秦岭的右代宫藏臼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2550498321508216","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7458947535609007129","book_info":{"abstract":"[多女无主+年龄差+阿姨+爽文+大家族+异能+多情景+不虐不绿不憋屈+不装逼不打脸]
江浪穿越了。
醒来发现在少妇家里，更不巧的是她男人回来了。
他马上躲进衣柜，屏住呼吸。
忽然间，来电铃声炸响......
“宝宝肚肚又打雷啦，你能给我点个外卖吃吗......”
--------------------------
我叫江浪，是一名辍学大学生，同时也是一名大混混。
我的人生信条是“肆意享受人生”，如果还要加一条，那就是“助人为乐”。
因为我帮助过很多人，身边的朋友也特别多。
我救过在会所被人欺负的邻家妹妹，资助条件困难的女同学，半路上帮助千金大小姐逃命，替在酒店被老外欺负的老师朋友......","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o3c1cc297ebe9f83b2e221c8a75d5b629~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"黑白老","author_id":"","book_id":"7458947535609007129","book_name":"肆意享受人生，我浪亿点怎么了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7458947542093398553","read_count":"170","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"141748"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"69","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,穿越,空间,多女主,都市异能","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o3c1cc297ebe9f83b2e221c8a75d5b629~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779251102&x-signature=RYqm7jA08btdinGDXrLrzjQ5qpo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"68606131975","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"65"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321122502CDF844BD4F39085FAD06"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"
